subject: Fix the service instance issue and support v21

Patch Set 4:

@Sylvain, SDNC fix has to go in before this change. Once that happens, all the SDNC robot tests would pass.

Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4:
> 
> @Sylvain, SDNC fix has to go in before this change. Once that happens, all the SDNC robot tests would pass.

There’s no need of fix for sdnc (I’ve hardcoded disablement of sdnrdb for gating to verify). 
So sdnc issue is transient I believe.
